nodes.label: iPhone 17 Pro - Silver Frame PNG
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 17 Pro - Silver.imageset/iPhone 17 Pro - Silver.png
nodes.summary: A Silver iPhone 17 Pro device frame PNG with a fully transparent screen cutout. The device features the iPhone 17 Pro horizontal pill-shaped camera bar across the top back. Frame dimensions: 450×920px. Screen cutout: 402×874px at offset (24, 23) in PNG coordinates — identical geometry to iPhone 16 Pro. Used as a compositing overlay where the transparent screen region reveals the user's recording.
nodes.camera_design: horizontal pill-shaped camera bar (across top back)
